task_completion.description: Create the 'Sable_Island' ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station configuration dialog or list showing the name 'Sable_Island' with Latitude 43.9333, Longitude -59.9167 (or 59.9167 W), and Altitude 5m.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Halifax' ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station configuration dialog or list showing the name 'Halifax' with Latitude 44.6488, Longitude -63.5752 (or 63.5752 W), and Altitude 10m.

task_completion.description: Set up a tracking module named 'DXpedition' using the 'Sable_Island' ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab or window titled 'DXpedition'. The module's header or configuration should indicate 'Sable_Island' as the active ground station.

task_completion.description: Track the required satellites in the 'DXpedition' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the 'DXpedition' module's satellite list. It must contain exactly or at least these satellites: ISS (ZARYA), AO-7, SO-50, AO-73 (FUNCUBE-1), and AO-85 (FOX-1A).

task_completion.description: Configure the 'DXpedition' module to show only the tabular 'List' view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Observe the layout of the 'DXpedition' module. It should only display a tabular list of satellites and their data. The Map view and Polar (radar) view must be completely removed/hidden from this module.
Look at the main GPredict window tabs or module list. The default 'Amateur' tab/module should no longer be visible.

integrity.description: Agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict graphical user interface being interacted with (e.g., dialog boxes, menus, module configurations) rather than just terminal windows.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI by editing configuration files directly in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open and editing files in the `~/.config/Gpredict/` directory to achieve the task.

integrity.description: The final state reflects genuine application rendering.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict window should naturally display the 'DXpedition' tab with the list view, and the 'Amateur' tab should be genuinely missing from the application's tab bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Sable_Island coordinates: Latitude 43.9333, Longitude -59.9167 (or 59.9167 W), Altitude 5m. Halifax coordinates: Latitude 44.6488, Longitude -63.5752 (or 63.5752 W), Altitude 10m. Required satellites to track: ISS (ZARYA) [NORAD: 25544], AO-7 [NORAD: 7530], SO-50 [NORAD: 27607], AO-73 / FUNCUBE-1 [NORAD: 39444], and AO-85 / FOX-1A [NORAD: 40967].
